text.title: Positioning Diff Log Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a positioning.diff.md entry and the monthly review post.

field.name: entry.source_quotes
field.notes: verbatim quote + source type + source URL or ID

forbidden.pattern: entry.source_quotes empty (no observable signal driving the change)
entry.success_metric.check_date past due AND check section still pending
live positioning on the landing page differs from positioning.diff.md head entry (drift)
new entry created while > 2 previous entries are past-due on their 30-day check
monthly_review post missing for any month with at least one live entry

allowed-transformations.transformation: Mark an entry rolled-back without deleting it; rollback is a status change with its own dated note explaining why.
Combine two entries into one when they arrived in the same week and share a trigger; preserve both source-quote sets.
Anonymise customer names in source_quotes when the source is a private demo or contract; never anonymise the substance.

list.item: Every entry has a closed-list trigger
Every entry has at least one verbatim source quote
Every entry has a numeric success metric with baseline and target
30-day and 90-day check sections present and dated
positioning.diff.md head entry matches live landing page
Monthly review post published on the first Monday of each month
